title: COMMUNITY DISPUTE RESOLUTION - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY RESOLUTION SERVICES COMMUNITY DISPUTE RESOLUTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mediation services for various community disputes, including neighbor disputes, landlord/tenant issues, manufactured home community issues, consumer/merchant disputes, family relationships (including elder care issues), small claims, and workplace conflict. Services are voluntary and confidential. Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-1:30pm and 2:30pm-5:30pm. Closed on holidays. Email (503) 655-8850 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-8415 Main phone Main phone (503) 655-8850 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Neighbor to neighbor disputes: None All other services: $125 per hour DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Landlord/Tenant Dispute Resolution Mediation Organizational Conflict Resolution Services Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION PROGRAM LEGAL ASSISTANCE MODALITIES - FAMILY LAW MEDIATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY RESOLUTION SERVICES
